title: carex scopulorum var. scopulorum
intro: Carex scopulorum var. scopulorum, also known as the Scouler's sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex scopulorum var. scopulorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
